title: Qwen 3.7 Max now available on Vercel AI Gateway
summary: Qwen 3.7 Max now available on Vercel AI Gateway
whyItMatters: Qwen 3.7 Max from Alibaba is now available on Vercel AI Gateway . The model is designed as an agent foundation, with capabilities spanning coding, office workflow automation, and long-horizon autonomous execution.
